title: carex muricata var. pairae
intro: Carex muricata var. pairae, also known as the rough sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) characterized by its unique, rough-edged leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex muricata var. pairae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
